rankDesc.description: Every 3rd Twin Slice or Fel Fireball within 15 seconds now generates 1 additional Felfury.

nodes.name: Demonborn
nodes.desc: Increases your Energy regeneration by 15%.

rankDesc.description: Increases your Energy regeneration by 15%.
Increases your Energy regeneration by 30%.

nodes.name: Felguard
nodes.desc: Emanate a powerful aura, granting 10% increased melee and ranged haste to party and raid members within 100 yds. Does not stack with similar effects.In addition, while Inner Demon is active, you now heal for 15% of all melee damage dealt.

rankDesc.description:
Emanate a powerful aura, granting 10% increased melee and ranged haste to party and raid members within 100 yds. Does not stack with similar effects.

In addition, while Inner Demon is active, you now heal for 15% of all melee damage dealt.

nodes.name: Focused Hatred
nodes.desc: Direct magical critical strikes now generate 5 Energy.

rankDesc.description: Direct magical critical strikes now generate 5 Energy.

nodes.name: Felheart
nodes.desc: Each Felfury active now increases your haste by 1%.

rankDesc.description: Each Felfury active now increases your haste by 1%.

nodes.name: Demonic Embrace
nodes.desc: Casting Inner Demon with at least 6 Felfury now restores 50 Energy.

rankDesc.description: Casting Inner Demon with at least 6 Felfury now restores 50 Energy.

nodes.name: Bulwark of Azzinoth
nodes.desc: Inner Demon now also reduces your damage taken by -10%.

rankDesc.description: Inner Demon now also reduces your damage taken by -10%.

nodes.name: Infernal Constitution
nodes.desc: Increases your maximum health by 10% and increases your off-hand weapon damage by 30%.

rankDesc.description: Increases your maximum health by 10% and increases your off-hand weapon damage by 30%.

nodes.name: Pure Hatred
nodes.desc: Your Hateforged Barrier now also scales with your dodge rating.

rankDesc.description: Your Hateforged Barrier now also scales with your dodge rating.

nodes.name: Infernal Whipcrack
nodes.desc: Enrage up to 8 allies within 20 yds, reducing their damage taken by -15% and increasing their haste by 10% for 10 seconds.

rankDesc.description: Enrage up to 8 allies within 20 yds, reducing their damage taken by -15% and increasing their haste by 10% for 10 seconds.

nodes.name: Burning Legionnaire
nodes.desc: Reduces the Energy cost of Twin Slice and Sunder by -10.

rankDesc.description: Reduces the Energy cost of Twin Slice and Sunder by -10.

nodes.name: Grommash's Folly
nodes.desc: While Inner Demon is active, your melee haste is now increased by 15% and you now heal equal to 50% of all damage dealt by critical strikes with auto attacks.In addition, critical strikes with Carve deal 5% increased damage, increasing up to 60% with each strike based on how long you channel.

rankDesc.description:
While Inner Demon is active, your melee haste is now increased by 15% and you now heal equal to 50% of all damage dealt by critical strikes with auto attacks.

In addition, critical strikes with Carve deal 5% increased damage, increasing up to 60% with each strike based on how long you channel.

nodes.name: Betrayer
nodes.desc: Dodging attacks causes 40% off-hand Weapon Damage to attackers and enrages your party and raid members within 20 yds, increasing their critical strike chance by 2% for 10 seconds.

rankDesc.description: Dodging attacks causes 40% off-hand Weapon Damage to attackers and enrages your party and raid members within 20 yds, increasing their critical strike chance by 2% for 10 seconds.

nodes.name: Felbreak
nodes.desc: Interrupt a spell from being cast, preventing the target from casting spells of that school for 3 seconds and draining mana from the target based on your Spirit.Usable while moving.

rankDesc.description:
Interrupt a spell from being cast, preventing the target from casting spells of that school for 3 seconds and draining mana from the target based on your Spirit.

Usable while moving.

nodes.name: Fel Infusion
nodes.desc: Increases critical strike chance of all party and raid members within 100 by 3%. Does not stack with similar effects.In addition, increases your critical strike chance by 3%.

rankDesc.description:
Increases critical strike chance of all party and raid members within 100 by 3%. Does not stack with similar effects.

In addition, increases your critical strike chance by 3%.

nodes.name: Malice of Gul'dan
nodes.desc: Direct critical strikes now have a 60% chance to trigger a Felstrike and generate a Fragment of Malice.FelstrikeBurn an enemy for 54 + 30% SP Shadowflame Damage over 6 seconds, stacking 3 times.Fragment of MaliceRestores 5 Energy and increases your critical strike chance by 10% for 5 seconds.

rankDesc.description:
Direct critical strikes now have a 60% chance to trigger a Felstrike and generate a Fragment of Malice.
Felstrike
Burn an enemy for 54 + 30% SP Shadowflame Damage over 6 seconds, stacking 3 times.
Fragment of Malice
Restores 5 Energy and increases your critical strike chance by 10% for 5 seconds.

nodes.name: Nether Spirit
nodes.desc: Increases your spell critical strike chance by 20% of your Spirit.

rankDesc.description: Increases your spell critical strike chance by 20% of your Spirit.

nodes.name: Twin Fury
nodes.desc: Critically striking with Twin Slice or Annihilan Strike now generates an additional 1 Felfury.

rankDesc.description: Critically striking with Twin Slice or Annihilan Strike now generates an additional 1 Felfury.

nodes.name: Archimonde's Wrath
nodes.desc: Increases the critical strike chance of your Felfury spenders by 1% for every 10 points of Energy you have at the time of casting.

rankDesc.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your Felfury spenders by 1% for every 10 points of Energy you have at the time of casting.

nodes.name: Azzinoth's Assault
nodes.desc: Consumes 2 FelfuryStrike an enemy for Weapon Damage plus 15 + 10% AP with both weapons, additionally scaling with your attack power.

rankDesc.description:
Consumes 2 Felfury
Strike an enemy for Weapon Damage plus 15 + 10% AP with both weapons, additionally scaling with your attack power.

nodes.name: Fury Unleashed
nodes.desc: Spin your glaives for 5 seconds, increasing movement speed by 30% and dealing 200% Weapon Damage every 1 sec with both weapons to all nearby enemies.You are immune to movement impairing and loss of control effects.

rankDesc.description:
Spin your glaives for 5 seconds, increasing movement speed by 30% and dealing 200% Weapon Damage every 1 sec with both weapons to all nearby enemies.

You are immune to movement impairing and loss of control effects.

rankDesc.description: Casting Chaos Rush now reduces the cooldown of Felhoof Charge by -2 sec.

nodes.name: Scars of Suffering / Fel Blades

rankDesc.description: Casting Azzinoth's Assault now scars the enemy, increasing your allies' attack power against them by 15% Agility for 10 seconds.

rankDesc.description: Triggering Dancing Blades now increases the damage of next Sargeron Smite by 8% for 20 seconds, stacking 5 times.

rankDesc.description: Dealing damage with Dancing Blades reduces the cooldown of Fury Unleashed by -1 sec.

nodes.name: Suffering / Gul'dan's Gift

rankDesc.description: Increases the duration of Skull of Gul'dan by 5 sec.

nodes.name: Felguard / Felstrider

rankDesc.description: Your Chaos Rush now reduces all damage taken by -3% for 5 seconds, stacking 2 times.

rankDesc.description: Damage dealt by Sargeron Smite now spreads your Cripple to 2 nearby enemies.
